---
title: "Articles and Publications"
subtitle: "Technical guides, tutorials, and insights on data science and engineering."
title-block-banner: true
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
toc-title: "Categories"
---

Below I share my publications, where I delve into technical solutions and step-by-step guides.

## AI & Agents

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### Build a Local AI Coding Agent with llama.cpp
**Secure, local code assistance**

Construct a coding assistant AI agent that runs entirely locally using llama.cpp, ensuring absolute source code privacy and zero recurring API costs.

**Topics:**

* Local LLMs (llama.cpp)
* AI Agents
* Python Development

::: {.card-footer .bg-transparent .border-0}
<span class="badge bg-dark">Generative AI</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">Python</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">Open Source</span>
<br><br>
[Read on Medium &rarr;](https://medium.com/towards-artificial-intelligence/build-local-ai-coding-agent-llama-cpp-826a8357b510){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::
:::


::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### Telegram-to-Notion Expense Tracker with Python and LLMs
**Conversational agent for expense management**

Build a Telegram bot that understands natural language and executes CRUD operations on Notion automatically, using an LLM agent with tool-calling.

**Topics:**

* Python & FastAPI
* LLM Agents (Tool-Calling)
* Notion API & Telegram

::: {.card-footer .bg-transparent .border-0}
<span class="badge bg-dark">Generative AI</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">Python</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">Notion</span>
<br><br>
[Read on Medium &rarr;](https://medium.com/mcd-unison/telegram-notion-ai-expense-tracker-14ff0c6bb954){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### Pocket AI: Telegram Bot with Python
**LLM deployment in messaging apps**

Implement a Python bot that queries a local LLM via Ollama: command handling, prompts, and a deployment ready for personal use.

**Topics:**

* Python & Aiogram
* Ollama (Local LLMs)
* API Management

::: {.card-footer .bg-transparent .border-0}
<span class="badge bg-dark">Generative AI</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">Python</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">Ollama</span>
<br><br>
[Read on Medium &rarr;](https://medium.com/mcd-unison/pocket-ai-telegram-bot-python-ollama-01da2c4d05df){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::
:::

:::

---

## Data Engineering

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### Connecting Python to HFSQL on Windows (ODBC + ETL)
**Data Engineering on Windows**

Practical pipeline to read HFSQL on Windows with ODBC and prepare data for ETL in Python (driver tips, compatibility, and troubleshooting).

**Topics:**

* ETL
* Data Engineering
* Legacy Systems

::: {.card-footer .bg-transparent .border-0}
<span class="badge bg-dark">Data Engineering</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">ETL</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">HFSQL</span>
<br><br>
[Read on Medium &rarr;](https://medium.com/mcd-unison/python-hfsql-etl-windows-5f54b73033fb){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### Connecting Python to HFSQL on Linux (ODBC + Docker/Podman)
**Data Engineering on Linux**

Connect legacy HFSQL to modern Linux environments using containers and ODBC: setup, configuration, and connection testing with Python.

**Topics:**

* Docker/Podman
* Data Engineering
* Legacy Systems

::: {.card-footer .bg-transparent .border-0}
<span class="badge bg-dark">Data Engineering</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">Docker</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">HFSQL</span>
<br><br>
[Read on Medium &rarr;](https://medium.com/mcd-unison/python-hfsql-linux-connection-2f05aa961e5b){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::
:::

:::

---

## Data & APIs

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### From Beats to Data: An Easy Guide to Spotify's API
**Step-by-step API tutorial**

Learn authentication, key endpoints, and how to turn your playlists into a dataset for analysis and visualization in Python.

**Topics:**

* Python
* Data Visualization
* API Management

::: {.card-footer .bg-transparent .border-0}
<span class="badge bg-dark">Tutorial</span>
<span class="badge bg-secondary">Python</span>
<span class="badge bg-success">Spotify</span>
<br><br>
[Read on Medium &rarr;](https://medium.com/mcd-unison/from-data-to-beats-an-easy-guide-to-spotifys-api-a646432ca0e1){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm .stretched-link}
:::
:::
:::
:::

:::
